ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., drone, satellite) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the vehicle */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the vehicle */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next maintenance for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "mission_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mission */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the test phase */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the phase belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test phase */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test phase (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test phase */,
  "test_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the test phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_phases_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the data belongs to */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test phase the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X position of the vehicle */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y position of the vehicle */,
  "z_position" REAL /* Z position of the vehicle */,
  "velocity_x" REAL /* X component of the velocity */,
  "velocity_y" REAL /* Y component of the velocity */,
  "velocity_z" REAL /* Z component of the velocity */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* X component of the acceleration */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Y component of the acceleration */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Z component of the acceleration */,
  "angular_velocity_x" REAL /* X component of the angular velocity */,
  "angular_velocity_y" REAL /* Y component of the angular velocity */,
  "angular_velocity_z" REAL /* Z component of the angular velocity */,
  "thrust" REAL /* Thrust level */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque level */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity */,
  "magnetic_field_x" REAL /* X component of the magnetic field */,
  "magnetic_field_y" REAL /* Y component of the magnetic field */,
  "magnetic_field_z" REAL /* Z component of the magnetic field */,
  "gps_latitude" REAL /* GPS latitude */,
  "gps_longitude" REAL /* GPS longitude */,
  "gps_altitude" REAL /* GPS altitude */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES test_phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data point */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the data belongs to */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test phase the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity */,
  "magnetic_field_x" REAL /* X component of the magnetic field */,
  "magnetic_field_y" REAL /* Y component of the magnetic field */,
  "magnetic_field_z" REAL /* Z component of the magnetic field */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES test_phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control command */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the command belongs to */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test phase the command belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the command */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of the command (e.g., thrust, torque) */,
  "command_value" TEXT /* Value of the command */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., issued, executed, failed) */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Whether the command was acknowledged by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_commands_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES test_phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_commands_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "actions_performed" TEXT /* Details of actions performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the sensor is installed on */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., GPS, temperature, pressure) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, malfunctioning) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sensors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the maintenance was performed on */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight log entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the log belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., pre-flight, post-flight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data affected by the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., data dropout, noise) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_detection" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detected anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., unexpected pattern, outlier) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who detected the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_detection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("data_id")
)
